column1: Column  1: EXPOCODE is unique identifier of a dataset
Column  3: LATITUDE is Latitude (degrees_north)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column  4: LONGITUDE is Longitude (degrees_east)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column  5: SOCAT_DOI is DOI of the SOCAT-enhanced dataset
Column  6: QC_FLAG is QC assessment of the dataset
Column  7: SOCAT_VERSION is SOCAT version with status
Column  8: DEPTH is sample depth (m)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column  9: YEAR is sample year    BAD FLAG : -99
Column 10: MONTH is sample month of year    BAD FLAG : -99
Column 11: DAY is sample day of month    BAD FLAG : -99
Column 12: HOUR is sample hour of day    BAD FLAG : -99
Column 13: MINUTE is sample minute of hour    BAD FLAG : -99
Column 14: SECOND is sample second of minute    BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 15: SAL is salinity (PSU)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 16: TEMP is sea surface temperature (degrees C)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 17: TEMPERATURE_EQUI is equilibrator chamber temperature (degrees C)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 18: PRESSURE_ATM is sea-level air pressure (hPa)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 19: PRESSURE_EQUI is equilibrator chamber pressure (hPa)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 20: WOA_SSS is salinity from World Ocean Atlas (PSU)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 21: PRESSURE_NCEP_SLP is sea level air pressure from NCEP/NCAR reanalysis (hPa)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 22: ETOPO2 is bathymetry from ETOPO2 (meters)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 23: DIST_TO_LAND is distance to major land mass (km)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 24: GVCO2 is GlobalView xCO2 (umol/mol)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 25: FCO2_RECOMMENDED is fCO2 recommended (uatm) (uatm)   BAD FLAG : -1.E+34
Column 26: FCO2_SOURCE is Algorithm number for recommended fCO2    BAD FLAG : -99
Column 27: WOCE_CO2_WATER is WOCE flag for aqueous CO2
